headline: Arcturus Picks Thermo Fisher To Support Cystic Fibrosis Therapy
summary: Arcturus partners with Thermo Fisher to support Phase 3 development and potential commercialization of ARCT-032 for cystic fibrosis.

raw.headline: Arcturus Picks Thermo Fisher To Support Cystic Fibrosis Therapy
raw.summary: Arcturus partners with Thermo Fisher to support Phase 3 development and potential commercialization of ARCT-032 for cystic fibrosis.

headline: Arcturus Therapeutics Announces Strategic Collaboration with Thermo Fisher Scientific to Advance ARCT-032 for Cystic Fibrosis
summary: SAN DIEGO, July 02, 2026--Arcturus Therapeutics Holdings Inc. ("Arcturus", Nasdaq: ARCT), a messenger RNA medicines company focused on the development of liver and respiratory rare disease therapeutics, today announced a strategic collaboration with Thermo Fisher Scientific, the world leader in serving science, to help support the Phase 3 development and potential commercialization of ARCT-032, Arcturus’ investigational mRNA therapy for Cystic Fibrosis.
